interpretation: This ledger distinguishes existing artifacts from terminally sufficient evidence. A completed diagnostic switch screen cannot make an unrelated incomplete comparator or family ceiling disappear.

required_outputs.name: Searchable thesis and Garrido-paper extraction notes
Primary-source literature review
required_outputs.claim_limit: Targeted current primary-source mechanism review; not a systematic review because the original complete query log was not retained.

required_outputs.name: Machine-readable approach registry
required_outputs.gap: The registry is complete as routing/governance, while the proof ledger correctly marks all 17 families nonterminal for Return B.

required_outputs.name: Candidate-mechanism ledger
required_outputs.claim_limit: The intervention ledger covers all current registry families; the older candidate-family ledger is historical and not itself a boundary proof.

required_outputs.name: Global adaptive-headroom sensitivity design and results
required_outputs.gap: No unified all-cell machine result exists for the whole portfolio; blocked extensions were not parameterized and M/T/R has no H_PI/H_obs result.

required_outputs.name: Pre-learner contracts and verification tests
required_outputs.gap: No candidate passes all gates; no prospective candidate-specific confirmatory contract exists.

required_outputs.name: Comparator-completeness audit
required_outputs.gap: Incomplete same-contract frontiers remain in historical Track A/B, D1, DRA2/E, F, H, longer-horizon J, K2, canonical-visible K3, Program L and M/T/R.

required_outputs.name: Action-trajectory audit
required_outputs.gap: K3 is decisively retracted; there is no qualified Paper-2 winner to audit, and Program L lacks a same-contract fixed-sequence replacement.

required_outputs.name: Paper-2 preregistration and confirmatory verdict
required_outputs.gap: No eligible candidate, frozen learner, allocated virgin block, learned state-feedback certificate or confirmatory result exists.

required_outputs.name: Paper-3 retained-learning protocol and verdict if authorized
required_outputs.gap: Add explicit current-task supersession of the historical C12 supported label; Paper 3 remains prohibited because learned Paper-2 value is absent.

required_outputs.name: Reproducibility manifest for local and VPS executions
required_outputs.gap: Regenerate from the final clean commit with required-set coverage, workbook identities, completed producer custody and independent replay artifacts.

required_outputs.name: Paper-facing claims table
required_outputs.gap: Separate tested-policy/contract-local nulls from certified family ceilings and machine-check JSON/Markdown parity after the terminal outcome.
